theme_and_archetype.theme: Dark Theme Default (with Light Mode toggle)
theme_and_archetype.mood_and_tone: Authority, Clarity, Truth, Premium Security. The aesthetic should feel like an exclusive, highly secure digital control room rather than a noisy public square.

typography.rules: Strict adherence to anti-default typography. Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard system sans for headings. Emphasize contrast and crispness.

colors.philosophy: Monochrome foundation with high-visibility surgical accents. No generic gradients.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The Control Room Grid. 12-column layout on desktop.

structure.left_sidebar: col-span-3 h-screen sticky top-0 border-r border-border p-6 flex flex-col justify-between

layout_and_spacing.spacing_rules: Generous internal padding (p-6, p-8) for right sidebar widgets and individual posts. Gap-6 between feed items.

surfaces.header_glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 border-b border-border z-50 sticky top-0
surfaces.post_container: border-b border-border p-6 hover:bg-surface/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-none). Primary CTA is vibrant blue with crisp white text. Hover states explicitly define background and text color.
components.stories_row: Horizontal scrollable flex container (p-4 gap-4 border-b border-border). Story rings should use a moving 'Tracing Beam' gradient or a solid primary border to indicate unread status. Avatars inside must be rounded-full with 2px padding between image and ring.
components.photo_posts: Images max-h-[70vh] w-full object-cover rounded-md border border-border mt-3.
components.chat_ui: ChatGPT aesthetic for AI. Sent messages use #1E1E1E with subtle glow, AI messages use transparent background with a left accent border (#0055FF) and #121212 background.
components.inputs_and_forms: Use Shadcn customized components. Inputs should have transparent backgrounds with solid bottom borders, or subtle 1px complete borders. Focus state must ring with Primary blue.
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Regular) for a distinct, high-end technical look instead of standard lucide.

media.instructions: All image URLs provided MUST be used. Do not use placeholder services.

interactions_and_accessibility.hover_states: All buttons MUST have explicit text color on hover (e.g. hover:bg-white hover:text-black).
interactions_and_accessibility.focus_states: Interactive elements must show ring-2 ring-primary focus indicator.
interactions_and_accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Override default tailwind configurations in tailwind.config.js to match the provided Hex color palette. Map background to #0A0A0A in dark mode.
Build the core layout using CSS Grid with a 12-column template for desktop. Strictly follow the col-span definitions (3 - 6 - 3).
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react, but prefer Phosphor for the technical UI feel.
Implement a theme toggle that switches between the exact hex values provided.

For the AI Chat screen, use a distinct UI pattern mapping to the 'chat_ui' specs: messages should not look like generic chat bubbles, but rather layered elevations (#1E1E1E) with subtle typography hierarchy.
Images for Avatars, Posts, and Stories MUST be populated from the exact URLs in the media section. Do not use placehold.it or standard gray boxes.
